description_long: This object is a rectangular, blocky filing cabinet with a woodgrain finish, featuring a vertical orientation and a flat top surface. The exterior displays a realistic wood texture with visible grain patterns in shades of brown and tan, giving it a natural and somewhat polished appearance. The cabinet lacks any visible handles, drawers, or label holders, suggesting a minimalist or monolithic design. All sides are smooth and uninterrupted, with no apparent seams, joints, or hardware. The top surface is flat and could be used to support other items, while the sides are uniformly finished. This type of cabinet would typically be found in an office or archive setting, blending functionality with a simple, understated aesthetic.
description: A rectangular, wood-finished filing cabinet with a smooth, uninterrupted exterior and a flat top surface. The cabinet features a natural woodgrain pattern and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: This view shows a vertical face with a prominent, dark woodgrain pattern and a flat top surface.
description_view_1: This side displays a lighter woodgrain texture with less pronounced lines and the same flat top.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this face has a strong, dark woodgrain pattern and a flat top surface.
description_view_3: This view reveals a lighter, more diffuse woodgrain pattern, matching the opposite side, with a flat top.
